source_metadata.title: 2025/12/04 - EDSI (Part 1)
source_metadata.description:
Thursday 4 December 2025 | Economic Development Science and Innovation Committee

2024/2025 Annual review of Ministry of Business, Innovation and Employment

Hearing of evidence:

Suzanne Stew, Acting Chief Executive
